name: takeoffEstimate
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || output.result.costPerSqFt === null || Number.isFinite(output.result.costPerSqFt)
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (server/domains/construction.js, registerLensAction('construction','takeoffEstimate',...)) — reached only via /api/lens/run on the EXACT key 'construction.takeoffEstimate' (3-arg handler(ctx, virtualArtifact, input), virtualArtifact.data === the unwrapped input). DETERMINISTIC pure compute (no LLM/network). Material takeoff: adjQty = qty × (1 + wastePercent/100), Math.ceil for ordering; lineCost = round(rawAdjQty × unitCost). Roll-up: labor = subtotal × laborPercent/100, overhead = (sub+labor) × 0.15, profit = (sub+labor+oh) × 0.10. POISON: every numeric coerced via finNum — non-finite ('Infinity'/'1e999'/'NaN') or |value|≥1e15 collapses to 0; laborPercent/wastePercent fall back to their 40/10 defaults when non-finite, so subtotal/labor/overhead/profit/grandTotal stay FINITE and costPerSqFt is null when squareFootage ≤ 0 (no divide-by-zero). Empty/absent/non-array lineItems degrade graceful (guidance message or caught handler_error), never throws. The GC-bench panel double-wraps ({ input: { artifact: { data } } }) — calcData() peels the redundant layer so the panel computes identically. NOT macro-assassin-driven (lives in LENS_ACTIONS, not MACROS — enumerateMacros(MACROS) does not reach it); authored spec pinned by server/tests/construction-lens-macros.test.js.
